rules.instruction: Run 'task pre-commit:run' on staged files before suggesting commits
Validate OpenAPI specification with 'task openapi:validate' before committing

rules.description: Maintain actor-based concurrency in Manager classes
rules.instruction: All *Manager classes should use actor pattern for thread safety, not DispatchQueue

rules.description: Use Task<Void, Never> for background tasks
rules.instruction: When creating background tasks, use Task<Void, Never> to enforce explicit error handling

Only add comments that explain non-obvious behavior or gotchas. Do not add comments that restate what the code does, describe parameters/returns for self-explanatory methods, or label sections of straightforward logic.
